pipes.pipe.ecsenvironmentfile.CfnAbout: A list of files containing the environment variables to pass to a container. You can specify up to ten environment files. The file must have a `.env` file extension. Each line in an environment file should contain an environment variable in `VARIABLE=VALUE` format. Lines beginning with `

pipes.pipe.ecsenvironmentfile.Type.Description: The file type to use. The only supported value is `s3`.

pipes.pipe.ecsenvironmentfile.Value.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Amazon S3 object containing the environment variable file.
